description: Platform-wide improvements identified through comprehensive codebase analysis. Covers security hardening, UX reliability, performance optimization, admin tooling, testing coverage, and marketing/SEO enhancements for the Gym Unity Suite enterprise SaaS platform.

userStories.title: Centralized input validation middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a centralized input sanitization layer so that all user-facing forms consistently prevent XSS, injection, and malformed input without relying on per-component implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a reusable sanitization wrapper or HOC that integrates with React Hook Form
Apply sanitizeInput() from src/lib/security/url-sanitization.ts to all text inputs via the wrapper
Ensure Zod schemas are enforced on every form across CRM, Members, Billing, and Staff domains
Fix the overly aggressive quote stripping in sanitizeInput() that breaks legitimate input
Add CSP header configuration in Cloudflare Pages _headers file
userStories.notes: Fixed sanitizeInput() to preserve apostrophes/quotes (SQL injection handled by parameterized queries). Created useSanitizedForm hook that wraps React Hook Form with automatic sanitization on submit. CSP headers already configured in public/_headers. Zod schemas in validation-schemas.ts provide form-level validation.

userStories.title: Client-side rate limiting enforcement
userStories.description: As a user, I want the application to proactively prevent excessive API calls so that I receive immediate feedback instead of waiting for server-side rejection.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap supabase client queries with the existing rate-limited-fetch utility from src/lib/rate-limited-fetch.ts
Create a rate-limited Supabase client wrapper that automatically applies throttling
Add debouncing to all search/filter inputs (currently only 1 debounce instance exists)
Show user-friendly toast when rate limit is approaching
Ensure rate limiting applies to mutation operations (create, update, delete)
userStories.notes: Created useRateLimitedQuery and useRateLimitedMutation hooks wrapping TanStack Query with automatic client-side rate limiting. Created useDebounce and useDebouncedCallback hooks for search/filter inputs. Rate limiting shows toast warnings when approaching limits and blocking messages when exceeded.

userStories.title: Comprehensive admin dashboard
userStories.description: As a gym owner/admin, I want a full admin interface so that I can manage users, view audit logs, configure organization settings, and monitor system health without needing direct database access.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin user/staff management page with role assignment capabilities
Build audit log viewer with filtering by action type, user, and date range
Create organization settings configuration panel (branding, timezone, business hours)
Implement the stubbed Monitoring page metrics and security tabs (src/pages/Monitoring.tsx:59-77)
Add permission audit trail showing who changed what permissions and when
Gate all admin pages behind MANAGE_SYSTEM permission
userStories.notes: Created AdminDashboardPage (/admin) with Overview, Users, and Audit Logs tabs. User management shows profiles with role filtering and search (debounced). Audit log viewer with action/result filters and search. Monitoring page Metrics tab now shows Web Vitals, DB response time, and API call data. Security tab shows security events, denied events, and severity breakdown. All gated behind MANAGE_SYSTEM permission.

userStories.title: Standardized loading and empty states
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent loading indicators and empty state messages across all pages so that I always understand what's happening and what actions I can take.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a reusable <EmptyState> component with icon, title, description, and optional action button
Create a <SectionLoader> component with skeleton variants for cards, tables, and lists
Apply consistent loading states to all data-fetching pages (currently only ~48 of 80 pages have loading states)
Add timeout handling that shows an error state if loading exceeds 10 seconds
Ensure all empty states include actionable guidance (e.g., 'Add your first member' button)
userStories.notes: EmptyState component created at src/components/ui/empty-state.tsx with icon, title, description, and action button. SectionLoader created at src/components/ui/section-loader.tsx with spinner, cards, table, list, and text skeleton variants. Applied to PaymentHistory and other new components.

userStories.title: Performance optimization with memoization
userStories.description: As a user, I want the application to remain responsive even with large datasets so that I can manage my gym operations efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add React.memo to high-frequency render components (table rows, list items, stat cards)
Implement useCallback for event handlers passed as props in list/grid components
Add useMemo for expensive computed values in analytics and reporting pages
Apply virtualization (VirtualList component already exists) to ClassesPage and ReportsPage
Profile before/after with React DevTools to verify render count reduction
Ensure dashboard widget components are memoized to prevent re-renders during drag operations
userStories.notes: React.memo added to WidgetRenderer, StatCardContent, QuickActionsWidget. useMemo added to ClassesPage stats and filtered classes. useCallback added to EnhancedPipelineView lead filtering. MemberGrowthChartWidget already had proper useMemo. VirtualList integration deferred to future iteration.

userStories.title: Expand test coverage for critical business domains
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive test coverage for business-critical features so that I can deploy with confidence and catch regressions early.
acceptanceCriteria: Add unit tests for all custom hooks in src/hooks/ (useMembers, useCheckIn, usePermissions, useSessionTimeout)
Add component tests for CRM LeadForm validation and submission
Add component tests for Billing workflow (subscription status, invoice generation)
Add E2E tests for the member check-in flow
Add E2E tests for the CRM lead creation and pipeline flow
Achieve minimum 40% line coverage on src/hooks/ and src/components/auth/
Add tests for the new ErrorBoundary integration points
userStories.notes: Currently only 4 unit test files and 4 E2E specs exist. Vitest and Playwright infrastructure is established and working. Focus should be on business-critical paths: auth, billing, CRM, and member management.

userStories.title: Complete incomplete feature placeholders
userStories.description: As a user, I want all visible features to be functional so that I don't encounter 'coming soon' placeholders that reduce confidence in the platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement the Settings page (/settings route currently shows placeholder text)
Implement the Retail/POS page (/retail route currently shows placeholder text)
Complete the Payment History tab in BillingPage
Remove or implement the 4 'coming soon' placeholders in PoolManagementPage
Add feature flags for genuinely incomplete features instead of showing 'coming soon' text
Complete the CheckInsPage TODO for navigation
userStories.notes: Settings page now uses OrganizationSettingsPage (general, features, billing, notifications, branding, custom domain tabs). Retail/POS page created with POSTerminal, ProductManager, InventoryManager, SalesReporting tabs. Payment History tab implemented with search, filters, and table. PoolManagementPage and feature flags deferred.

userStories.title: SEO coverage for all public pages
userStories.description: As a marketing manager, I want all public-facing pages to have proper SEO metadata so that we maximize organic search visibility and traffic.
acceptanceCriteria: Add React Helmet <Helmet> meta tags to all public pages (currently only ~10 of 80 pages have SEO)
Implement dynamic schema.org JSON-LD structured data for solution and comparison pages
Create a reusable SEOWrapper component that enforces consistent meta tag patterns
Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags to all blog posts
Ensure all blog posts have reading time estimates and auto-generated table of contents
Add internal linking between related blog posts and solution pages
userStories.notes: SEOHead component exists at src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx but is inconsistently used. Compare pages and solution pages have good SEO. Most internal/authenticated pages lack meta tags. Blog posts lack reading time and TOC features.

userStories.title: Monitoring dashboard completion
userStories.description: As a system administrator, I want a functional monitoring dashboard so that I can track system health, security events, and performance metrics in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement the Metrics tab with real-time API response time charts
Implement the Security tab with security event log viewer and alerting
Integrate the existing APM service (src/lib/monitoring/apm.ts) data into the dashboard
Add alerting configuration for critical thresholds (high error rates, slow responses)
Show Supabase connection health and Edge Function status
userStories.notes: Metrics tab replaced with MetricsDashboard component showing real Web Vitals (page load, TTFB, DOM content loaded, DNS), DB response time, JS/CSS bundle counts, memory usage, and API call tracking. Security tab replaced with SecurityDashboard component showing audit stats by layer/severity, recent critical events, and filterable log viewer. All tabs wrapped with ErrorBoundary.

userStories.title: Bulk operations across all domains
userStories.description: As a gym manager, I want to perform bulk operations on members, classes, and billing so that I can efficiently manage large-scale changes without repetitive individual actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add bulk select/deselect functionality to MembersPage list
Implement bulk member status changes (activate, freeze, cancel)
Add bulk email/SMS communication to selected members
Add bulk class cancellation with automatic attendee notification
Extend existing BulkMemberOperations component (src/components/corporate/) for general use
Add confirmation dialogs for all destructive bulk actions
userStories.notes: BulkMemberOperations component exists in src/components/corporate/ but is limited to the corporate context. No bulk operations exist for classes, billing, or general member management.

userStories.title: Error boundary coverage for remaining pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want individual page sections to fail gracefully so that one broken component doesn't prevent me from using the rest of the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to ClassesPage calendar and list sections
Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to ReportsPage chart sections
Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to StaffPage management sections
Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to EquipmentPage tracking components
Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to CheckInsPage kiosk and history sections
Add ErrorBoundary wrappers to MarketingPage campaign components
userStories.notes: ErrorBoundary wrappers added to: ClassesPage (calendar, templates), ReportsPage (analytics dashboard), StaffPage (schedule manager, payroll manager), EquipmentPage (all 5 tab sections), CheckInsPage (check-in operations section), MarketingPage (all 5 campaign tabs). RetailPage also wrapped with error boundaries.

userStories.title: Mobile PWA experience enhancement
userStories.description: As a gym member, I want a polished mobile experience so that I can check in, view my schedule, and manage my account from my phone.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit and fix mobile responsiveness issues across all pages
Optimize touch targets for mobile (minimum 44x44px tap targets)
Implement offline mode for critical features (check-in, schedule viewing)
Add pull-to-refresh on mobile dashboard and member pages
Improve PWA install prompt and app-like navigation
Test and fix dark mode on all mobile views
userStories.notes: PWA infrastructure exists (manifest.json, sw.js) and mobile-specific components are in src/components/mobile/. The mobile experience is estimated at 60% completion. Mobile routes exist for dashboard, check-in, and workout.

userStories.title: Multi-tenant organization_id filter audit for CRM domain
userStories.description: As a platform operator, I want all CRM queries to enforce organization_id filtering so that tenant data isolation is guaranteed even if RLS policies are misconfigured.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit all Supabase queries in src/components/crm/ for missing organization_id filters
Fix LeadAttributionManager disputes query to scope by organization leads
Fix LeadDetail activities query to use inner join with organization_id
Fix LeadAnalyticsDashboard activities query to scope by organization
Add organization_id checks to SalespersonCommissionManager and SalespersonReferralManager queries
Create a lint rule or code review checklist for organization_id enforcement
userStories.notes: Fixed 3 critical missing organization_id filters: LeadAttributionManager (disputes query now scopes by org leads with explicit ID fetch), LeadDetail (activities now use inner join on leads.organization_id), LeadAnalyticsDashboard (activities query now uses inner join with organization_id filter). Empty array guard added to prevent queries with zero lead IDs.

userStories.title: Protect payment callback routes with authentication
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want all payment-related callback routes to require authentication so that unauthenticated users cannot access payment confirmation or cancellation pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap /membership-success route with ProtectedRoute
Wrap /payment-success route with ProtectedRoute
Wrap /payment-cancelled route with ProtectedRoute
Wrap /payment-demo route with ProtectedRoute
Verify all payment pages redirect to login when unauthenticated
Add appropriate error handling for expired payment sessions
userStories.notes: All 4 payment callback routes (/membership-success, /payment-success, /payment-cancelled, /payment-demo) now wrapped with ProtectedRoute in App.tsx. Unauthenticated users are redirected to login before accessing any payment result page.

userStories.title: Form validation and input sanitization for CRM and Members
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all critical forms to use Zod schema validation and input sanitization so that invalid or malicious data cannot enter the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Zod validation schema to LeadForm with email, field length, and enum validation
Add Zod validation schema to AddMemberDialog with email and required field validation
Wire sanitizeFormData from useSanitizedForm to both forms on submission
Display inline validation error messages for invalid fields
Add aria-required and aria-invalid attributes for accessibility
Replace Math.random password generation with crypto.getRandomValues in AddMemberDialog
Migrate remaining forms (StaffPage, BillingPage) to use Zod + sanitization
userStories.notes: LeadForm now uses Zod schema (leadFormSchema) with email validation, field length limits, enum constraint on interest_level, and sanitizeFormData on submit. AddMemberDialog uses addMemberSchema with required first/last name, email validation, and sanitized data. Password generation upgraded from Math.random to crypto.getRandomValues. Inline validation errors displayed with aria attributes for accessibility.

userStories.title: CRM lead fetching N+1 query optimization
userStories.description: As a gym manager with many leads, I want the CRM page to load quickly so that I can efficiently manage my sales pipeline without performance lag.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace N+1 per-lead queries in CRMPage fetchLeads with Supabase joins
Use single query with lead_stages and profiles joins instead of individual lookups
Add fallback batch query strategy if FK-based joins fail
Ensure assigned staff are fetched in a single batch query using .in() with unique IDs
Verify performance improvement with 50+ leads
Apply same optimization pattern to other N+1 queries across the codebase
userStories.notes: CRMPage fetchLeads refactored from N+1 pattern (2 queries per lead = 100 queries for 50 leads) to single Supabase join query. Primary approach uses FK-based joins for lead_stages and profiles. Fallback strategy fetches stages via join and batches staff lookups into single .in() query with deduplication. Reduces queries from O(2n) to O(1-3).

userStories.title: Toast notification consistency across all domains
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent notification feedback across all features so that success and error messages appear in a uniform style.
acceptanceCriteria: Standardize all components to use sonner toast library (currently mixed sonner + useToast)
Add toast.success for all successful mutations that currently lack feedback
Add toast.error for all error catch blocks that only console.error
Implement a toast wrapper utility for consistent formatting
Remove duplicate toast imports and consolidate to single pattern
userStories.notes: Mixed toast patterns found: sonner (toast.success/toast.error) used in CRM, LeadForm; useToast hook (with variant='destructive') used in AddMemberDialog, StaffPage. Some mutations lack any user feedback (e.g., MembershipPlansPage checkSubscriptionStatus). Standardize to sonner for consistency.

userStories.title: CRM placeholder components implementation
userStories.description: As a gym sales manager, I want fully functional CRM sub-features so that I can manage email templates, follow-ups, lead scoring, and tour scheduling without encountering 'Coming Soon' placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement EmailTemplateManager in src/components/crm/PlaceholderCRMComponents.tsx
Implement FollowUpTasksManager for automated follow-up scheduling
Implement LeadScoringManager for customizable lead scoring rules
Implement LeadSourcesManager for source tracking configuration
Implement ToursSchedulingManager for prospect tour booking
Replace all 'Coming Soon' badges with functional components or remove from navigation
userStories.notes: PlaceholderCRMComponents.tsx contains 5+ stub components with 'Coming Soon' badges. These are visible in the CRM module tabs. Additional coming soon placeholders in: SimpleCommissionTrackingManager, PoolManagementPage (4 placeholders), CourtSportsPage, staff components. Total ~15 Coming Soon instances across the codebase.

userStories.title: Stripe webhook failed payment notification
userStories.description: As a gym member, I want to be notified when my payment fails so that I can update my payment method before losing access to the gym.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement failed payment notification in stripe-webhook edge function (TODO at line 463)
Send email notification to member on payment failure
Add in-app notification for failed payments
Include a direct link to update payment method in the notification
Log failed payment events in audit trail
userStories.notes: Stripe webhook handler at supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts has a TODO comment at line 463 for sending failed payment notifications. Currently the webhook processes the event but doesn't notify the affected user.
